calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Sep-02-2020 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Oleg Belrov for Plaintiff/Respondent opposing party in pro per.
21st Century Insurancy Company for Defendant/Appellant Moving party is NOT PRESENT.

Hearing is held. The Court makes inquiries as to why the other side is not present. Mr. Belrov explains that counsel did contact him requesting a settlement. The Court proceeds to hear the matter.

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as for the plaintiff. Judgment to be sent in the mail. Judge Pro Tem: Henry Shain, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not Reported (D525)

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jul-02-2020 Continued To Sep-02-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
